items.title: After $2 Billion Nvidia Investment, Nebius Group Just Became the Real Neocloud Winner
items.description: Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) just announced it is investing $2 billion in neocloud star Nebius Group (NASDAQ:NBIS), echoing the similar-sized stake it took in peer CoreWeave (NASDAQ:CRWV) earlier this year. Yet the deal runs far deeper than the headline number. It reveals precisely which neocloud operators Nvidia believes can propel its own ambitious roadmap forward in the ... After $2 Billion Nvidia Investment, Nebius Group Just Became the Real Neocloud Winner

items.title: Stock Market Today, March 11: Oracle Surges After Earnings Beat and Upbeat Long-Term Revenue Guidance
items.description: Today, March 11, 2026, investors are weighing blockbuster cloud and AI growth against massive data center spending and cash flow pressure.

items.title: Princeton Digital Group Plans Up to $5 Billion Debt for AI Data Centers
items.description: Warburg Pincus-backed operator seeks financing to expand AI data centers across India, Indonesia, Malaysia and Japan.
